notes: v0.7.0: Full Cortex MCP combo integration (flux-cortex, flux-graph, flux-optimize). P2P mesh block sync via flux-p2p (Delta+Epsilon+Gamma+Beta). Swarm coordination + content-addressed version control (flux-rev). Fleet node tracking for AI operators. MCP swarm compile handler (flux_swarm_compile) for cross-server distributed builds. Embedded HTTP server (serve.rs) for wallet+vite-engine on localhost:9800. Backward-compat auto-update from v0.5.7+.
